positive: A whimsical and energetic scene featuring three stylized, anthropomorphic forest animals (a fox, a bear cub, and a raccoon) engaged in a joyful picnic under a stylized celestial canopy. The animals are depicted with clean, thick line art and simplified shapes, giving them a friendly, cartoonish silhouette. The picnic setting includes stylized floral arrangements and picnic baskets. The overall style is modern illustrative, reminiscent of Nordic folklore art meets sticker design, using flat color planes, strong outlines, and limited, harmonious colors (deep forest green, mustard yellow, burnt orange, and dusty blue). Composition should be centered and balanced, designed for optimal print coverage on a T-shirt. Focus on crisp edges and high contrast against a plain, light background.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, out-of-focus, poorly drawn anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, grayscale, photographic, 3d render, logo, trademark, celebrity
